messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-496 — A decided approval ask must close even under Telegram rate-limiting: surface the edit rejection and honour retry_after with a bounded retry
What it solves: THE DEFECT (post-ship of BL-484). BL-484's decided-ask close works on disk (human_approval flips,
recordApprovalReply fires, the message_id IS persisted) but its Telegram message edit fails
INTERMITTENTLY against the LIVE API, leaving decided asks with live, re-tappable buttons and no
verdict line.…
Approval context: Approving approves the fix contract above: (1) surface the real edit-rejection reason in the log, (2) honour Telegram's retry_after with a bounded, injected-clock retry and a loud give-up, (3) real-path burst acceptance against a rate-limiting Telegram double. FIRM per the operator: the diagnosabil…
BL-496 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-496" (or "reject BL-496 <reason>") to act.
